curation_notes: Patch commit 924a107 modifies exactly two source files: AnalyticsDatabase/ModelPermission.ts and Database/Permissions/TenantPermission.ts. Both contain the same bug in addTenantScopeToQuery where the else-if condition (!props.tenantId && props.userGlobalAccessPermission) never fires when a client sends the is-multi-tenant-query header with a projectid header, because tenantId is set and isMultiTenantRequest bypasses the first branch's guard. The fix adds || props.isMultiTenantRequest to ensure the global-access scoping path is taken for multi-tenant requests. Pre-assigned class auth-bypass (CWE-285, CWE-862) matches the advisory and diff — no override needed.
